competitor_gap_brief.prospect_position_summary: The prospect matches the sample's AI-augmented BI profile and sits below the top-quartile benchmark.
competitor_gap_brief.recommended_hook: Lead with the dedicated AI leadership gap (high confidence, two strong peer examples). Frame as a question — 'is the AI leadership role still being scoped, or is it deliberately distributed across the CTO remit?' — not an assertion of a gap. Avoid the MLOps gap in the first email; it is medium confidence and the prospect may have the function inside their Data Platform Engineer JD.

gap_findings.description: Orrin Labs has no named AI/ML leadership role. CTO holds a combined infrastructure-and-data remit per the public team page.
gap_findings.title: Dedicated AI/ML leadership role at the executive level

gap_findings.description: Orrin Labs has Data Platform Engineer roles open but no explicitly MLOps-labeled roles. The distinction may be deliberate (integrated in data-platform role) or a gap.
gap_findings.title: Dedicated MLOps / ML-platform engineering function (roles open 45+ days suggests active buildout)

gap_findings.description: Orrin Labs blog mentions AI as a priority but has no technical depth posts on agentic workflows or evaluation in the last 12 months.
gap_findings.title: Public technical commentary on agentic or evaluation-framework work

competitor_gap_brief.peer_group_definition: AI-augmented BI for mid-market against a top-quartile benchmark of 2.75
competitor_gap_brief.prospect_position_summary: The prospect matches the sample's AI-augmented BI profile and sits below the top-quartile benchmark.
competitor_gap_brief.recommended_hook: Lead with the dedicated AI leadership gap (high confidence, two strong peer examples). Frame as a question — 'is the AI leadership role still being scoped, or is it deliberately distributed across the CTO remit?' — not an assertion of a gap. Avoid the MLOps gap in the first email; it is medium confidence and the prospect may have the function inside their Data Platform Engineer JD.

ai_maturity_reasoning: ai_adjacent_open_roles: Two Data Platform Engineer roles and one ML Engineer role open on BuiltIn. 3 of 11 total engineering openings are AI-adjacent (27%).
named_ai_ml_leadership: No public Head of AI, VP Data, or Chief Scientist on the team page. CTO holds a combined infrastructure-and-data remit.
executive_commentary: CEO blog post Feb 2026 mentions 'AI-powered insights' as a 2026 priority. No keynote or podcast appearances on AI strategy in the last 12 months.

github_org_activity: Public GitHub org has 4 repos, all non-AI (developer tooling). Absence of AI repos is not proof of absence — AI work may be in private repos.

ai_maturity_reasoning: ai_adjacent_open_roles: Two Data Platform Engineer roles and one ML Engineer role open on BuiltIn. 3 of 11 total engineering openings are AI-adjacent (27%).
named_ai_ml_leadership: No public Head of AI, VP Data, or Chief Scientist on the team page. CTO holds a combined infrastructure-and-data remit.
executive_commentary: CEO blog post Feb 2026 mentions 'AI-powered insights' as a 2026 priority. No keynote or podcast appearances on AI strategy in the last 12 months.
modern_data_ml_stack: BuiltWith reports dbt and Snowflake in use. No Databricks, no Weights and Biases, no vLLM. Stack is modern-data but not ML-platform-modern.
github_org_activity: Public GitHub org has 4 repos, all non-AI (developer tooling). Absence of AI repos is not proof of absence — AI work may be in private repos.

github_org_activity: Public GitHub org has 4 repos, all non-AI (developer tooling). Absence of AI repos is not proof of absence — AI work may be in private repos.

competitor_gap_brief.recommended_hook: Lead with the dedicated AI leadership gap (high confidence, two strong peer examples). Frame as a question — 'is the AI leadership role still being scoped, or is it deliberately distributed across the CTO remit?' — not an assertion of a gap. Avoid the MLOps gap in the first email; it is medium confidence and the prospect may have the function inside their Data Platform Engineer JD.

ai_maturity_reasoning: ai_adjacent_open_roles: Two Data Platform Engineer roles and one ML Engineer role open on BuiltIn. 3 of 11 total engineering openings are AI-adjacent (27%).
named_ai_ml_leadership: No public Head of AI, VP Data, or Chief Scientist on the team page. CTO holds a combined infrastructure-and-data remit.
executive_commentary: CEO blog post Feb 2026 mentions 'AI-powered insights' as a 2026 priority. No keynote or podcast appearances on AI strategy in the last 12 months.
modern_data_ml_stack: BuiltWith reports dbt and Snowflake in use. No Databricks, no Weights and Biases, no vLLM. Stack is modern-data but not ML-platform-modern.
github_org_activity: Public GitHub org has 4 repos, all non-AI (developer tooling). Absence of AI repos is not proof of absence — AI work may be in private repos.
